game_name: Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

special_mechanics.name: Character Switching
special_mechanics.description: Multiple playable characters with different playstyles: Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, Chewbacca, Princess Leia, and Wicket. Princess Leia's appearance and playstyle change based on plot (staff as Boushh bounty hunter, broken chain as escaped slave, blaster as Rebel leader).

special_mechanics.name: Force Powers (Luke)
special_mechanics.description: Luke Skywalker has 5 Force powers (reduced from 9 in previous game) with easier recharging. Cannot use blaster variations.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Mode 7 quasi-3D vehicle sequences including Endor speeder bike chase and Millennium Falcon cruise.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Character-specific weapon mechanics (staff, chain, blasters, lightsaber variants)

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Available sources contain qualitative gameplay descriptions but no quantified physics parameters. Game praised for graphics and character variety; criticized for potentially frustrating controls and repetitive level design compared to predecessors. Controls identical to predecessor (Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back).
